sc_data_source: SC_Data_2026-04-08.json (fresh scrape — Business Reports, Inventory, and Payments Dashboard scraped today)
data_quality: GOOD — business report, inventory, and payments data are fresh. PPC data carried from 2026-04-04 (Campaign Manager inaccessible 5th day). Ad spend CONFIRMED via Payments Dashboard ($217.48).

fountain._velocity_note: 9 units / 31 days = 0.290 units/day. Improved from 0.258/day on 04/06.
fountain.overstock_alert: 377 units at 0.290/day = 1,300 days of cover. STORAGE FEES NOW CONFIRMED: $246.63 monthly storage charged in current settlement period.
fountain._storage_note: FBA monthly inventory storage fee from Payments Dashboard. This covers ALL SKUs but majority is from fountain (377 units) and filters (141 units).

filters.overstock_alert: 141 units at 0.129/day = 1,093 days of cover. Storage fees accumulating (included in $246.63 monthly total).

bundle.note: Bundle getting 8 sessions but 0 conversions (0% CVR). Featured offer at 85.71% — buy box issues continue.

totals._ad_spend_note: CONFIRMED from Payments Dashboard: $217.48 in 'Cost of Advertising' for settlement period 3/28-present (11 days). Proportioned to 31-day: ~$217.48 × (31/11) = ~$612.72 run-rate equivalent (NOT actual — settlement period is shorter than report period).
totals._ad_spend_31day_note: Estimated $10/day × 31 days = $310. Conservative vs $217.48 in 11 days ($19.77/day would imply $613).
totals._storage_note: NEWLY VISIBLE — monthly FBA storage fee from Payments Dashboard. Not previously tracked in P&L.
totals._tcm_note: Gross Profit $188.51 - Ad Spend est. $310.00 - Storage Fees $246.63 = -$368.12

totals._ad_spend_note: Based on confirmed $19.77/day from settlement × 7 days = $138.39

pl_7day.actual_acos_pct: Settlement-confirmed: $217.48 ad cost / $449.91 fountain revenue = 48.3% (improved vs prior 72.5% estimate — settlement period shorter than 31-day report)

razor_blade_ratio.note: 0.44 filter units per fountain unit (declined from 0.50 on 04/06 as fountain sold 1 more but filters unchanged). Target is 1.0.

unit_economics_per_fountain._ad_cost_note: Estimated: $310 ad spend / 9 units = $34.44/unit. Improved from $36.25 on 04/06. Target: $12.50/unit at 25% ACoS. Still 2.8x above target.
unit_economics_per_fountain._storage_note: $246.63 / 9 units = $27.40/unit — storage is now a LARGER cost than COGS ($17.58)!
unit_economics_per_fountain.status: DEEPLY UNPROFITABLE — storage fees now make each sale cost MORE to fulfill

payments_snapshot.note: Balance worsened $210.92 from 04/06 primarily due to $246.63 monthly storage fee hitting settlement. Product charges up +$49.99 (1 fountain sold). Amazon will CHARGE $294.50 on 4/11 — cash outflow in 3 days.

cash_flow_4week._ad_note: Assumes budget cut to $5/day actioned this week

critical: STORAGE FEES HIT: $246.63 monthly FBA storage fee charged — this is now the SINGLE LARGEST COST LINE in the business, exceeding COGS ($174.10) and Amazon fees ($167.30).
AMAZON CHARGE DUE 4/11: -$294.50 scheduled — cash outflow in 3 days.
DEEPLY UNPROFITABLE: True contribution margin -$368.12 over 31 days (including storage). Business burning ~$11.88/day net.
AD SPEND STILL RUNNING: Confirmed $19.77/day average from settlement. Campaigns NOT paused despite 5 days of recommendations.
warning: MASSIVELY OVERSTOCKED: Fountain 1,300 days cover (377 units), Filters 1,093 days cover (141 units). Storage fees will recur monthly.
RAZOR-BLADE RATIO 0.44: Declined from 0.50 — filter attach rate falling as fountain sales increase without matching filter sales.
PROMO REBATES -$99.98: Unchanged — large promotional spend continues.
BUNDLE DEAD: 8 sessions, 0 conversions, 85.71% featured offer. Consider deactivating.
positive: BSR SURGED: 168,729 → 129,598 — improved 39,131 positions! Biggest BSR gain since launch. Yesterday's fountain sale drove significant rank improvement.
FOUNTAIN UNITS UP: 8 → 9 units in 31-day window (+12.5%). CVR improved 3.25% → 3.38%.
FILTER CVR 28.57%: Still extremely strong for repeat purchase.
ORGANIC SALES WORKING: Dashboard shows consistent daily sales (filter today, fountain yesterday) — organic discovery improving independent of PPC.
CONFIRMED AD SPEND LOWER THAN ESTIMATED: Settlement shows $19.77/day actual vs $45/day budget capacity — budgets may already be underspending.
